targetDocDesc: Document ID for storing Toggl database
initialDaysDesc: How many days of history to fetch on first sync
statusBarDesc: Show current Toggl timer in status bar
repairSyncConfirm: Repair sync compares local data with Toggl. Entries that exist locally but not in Toggl will be marked as deletable. Continue?
clearSyncConfirm: Clearing sync time will re-fetch all data on next sync. Continue?
timerRunningWarn: Currently tracking: {desc} ({duration}). Starting a new timer will stop the current one.
